abilities.name: Powder Special
abilities.description: This replaces @node-blue #Backstab# as your heavy hit. You want to @click-left #Melee# to build the @element-earth #Powder Special# bar. Once it is fully charged, you can #[SHIFT]# + @click-left #Melee# to cast it, dealing massive damage.

abilities.name: Marked
abilities.description: @node-assassin #Spin-Attack# and @node-assassin #Smoke-Bomb# will be used to apply this. This is a huge damage increase.

abilities.name: Surprise Strike
abilities.description: When in @node-blue #Vanish#, on your next hit, you will be revealed and deal #+80%# more damage.

abilities.name: Satsujin
abilities.description: This will consume ALL @node-red #Marks# from the enemy to deal even more damage. This has a PER ENEMY cooldown, keep track of this.

abilities.name: Mirror Image
abilities.description: Slaying a clone give you #+30%# Damage Bonus for #3s#. You can force it by casting @node-blue #Bamboozle#!

abilities.name: Nightcloak Knives
abilities.description: You can get these by casting @node-assassin #Spin-Attack# while in @node-blue #Vanish# when the enemy has #2 or more# @node-red #Marks#. These Knives will attack with you dealing more damage.

abilities.name: Silent Killer
abilities.description: This resets your @node-blue #Vanish# cooldown entirely after killing an enemy. You want to stay in @node-blue #Vanish# when playing H-Melee Shadestepper.

aspects.name: Shadestepper's Embodiment of Unseen Execution
aspects.description: This aspect allows you to instantly go in @node-blue Vanish more often. Additionally, the reduction in @node-red Satsujin cooldown is a dps increase. You basically need this.

aspects.name: Aspect of the Calling Card
aspects.description: This not only increases your damage, this makes it easier to get @node-blue Nightcloak Knives because it increases the maximum @node-red Marks per enemy.

aspects.name: Aspect of the Dagger's Silhouette
aspects.description: This makes it easier to get the full benefit of @node-blue Nightcloak Knives, with this aspect, and the @node-red Marks aspect at Tier 2, you can get all your @node-blue Nightcloak Knives in 1 cycle.

aspects.name: Aspect of the Chain Knife
aspects.description: The extra @click-left Melee range makes it easier to build the @element-earth Powder Special bar.

aspects.name: Aspect of the Pinwheel
aspects.description: This makes it easier to get @node-blue Nightcloak Knives as the increased @node-assassin Spin-Attack range.
